_comment: Auto-update manifest consumed by tauri-plugin-updater. Updated by .github/workflows/release.yml on every release; do not edit by hand. The signature field carries a minisign signature of the corresponding installer; the matching public key is baked into apps/desktop/tauri.conf.json under plugins.updater.pubkey.
notes: Mycelium v0.1.0-beta.1 first beta. See https://github.com/Arka-ui/mycelium/releases for full notes.
